message:
feat(refresh-ledger): persist .lexical-refresh-evidence.json sidecar [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.24]

ibuuh.24 evidence-ledger wiring: integrate the RefreshLedgerEvidence
shipped in 1ffd8494 into the publish path so every authoritative
lexical publish writes a derived-evidence sidecar next to the raw
ledger. Benchmark gates and operator dashboards now have headline
metrics (throughput, dominant phase, phase share, aggregate items+s)
without re-running the math at every call site.

What landed:
- New helper lexical_refresh_evidence_path(index_path) returns
  .lexical-refresh-evidence.json next to .lexical-refresh-ledger.json.
- New persist_lexical_refresh_evidence(index_path, &evidence) writes
  the evidence atomically via write_json_pretty_atomically (same
  durability pattern as the raw ledger).
- persist_lexical_refresh_ledger() now ALWAYS calls
  persist_lexical_refresh_evidence(&ledger.evidence_summary())
  after the raw ledger write succeeds. Sidecar failure does NOT
  abort the publish — the raw ledger is the source of truth, the
  sidecar is a derived view that can be re-computed offline by
  calling RefreshLedger::evidence_summary(). A sidecar write error
  emits tracing::warn so an operator can investigate without losing
  publish progress.

Regression test
authoritative_publish_emits_lexical_refresh_evidence_sidecar pins
three invariants:
1. The sidecar lands at the expected path on every publish.
2. The JSON shape matches the documented contract (every field of
   RefreshLedgerEvidence present: throughput / phase_share /
   dominant_phase / aggregate_items_processed / aggregate_duration_ms /
   aggregate_items_per_second).
3. The sidecar value EQUALS RefreshLedger::evidence_summary() of
   the persisted ledger. A regression that swapped the sidecar's
   source (e.g. computed from a different ledger snapshot) would
   silently desync; pinning equality directly catches that. Plus
   spot-pin aggregate_duration_ms == ledger.total_duration_ms and
   aggregate_items_processed == ledger.total_items_processed().

Existing publish-path test
rebuild_tantivy_from_db_persists_packet_refresh_ledger still green.
21/21 lib indexer::refresh_ledger + 75/75 e2e cli_index green via
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2 cargo test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
